title: calepina corvini
intro: Calepina corvini, also known as Calepina, is a perennial plant belonging to the mustard family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calepina corvini include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Calepina corvini is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in topical applications or as a tincture in traditional herbal medicine.
